text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ardan has finally gotten the all clear to return to
racing, but she seems really anxious after
watching Oguri run...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But I can tell her blazing passion to pursue her dream is still burning bright! Even if she doesn't believe in herself, I do! 110 percent! And I let her know it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: The next day, Ardan tells me she's going to come watch the Takamatsunomiya Kinen because she wants to see the passion I have for my dream!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've got to win so I can show her my drive and my
dream! Takamatsunomiya Kinen, here I come!
